datasets.name: LongMemEval cleaned ranking ablation
datasets.selection_policy: stable source order after dataset-specific mapping policy

limits: This pass varies reranker_pool only; top-k, chunking, and query expansion stay fixed.
RRF k and branch weights are now exposed in kr-eval and can be swept independently.
Report excludes raw questions, answers, dialogs, and session text.
Results are ranking evidence, not official answer-generation DMR scores.
